summary: 本轮按严格时序与相关性筛选后，只发现 1 项真正新增且足够相关的条目：`MIDAS Hand`。它在 2026-07-16 首次公开，是一个低成本、开源、带触觉感知的类人尺度灵巧手，并同时公开了控制、触觉 API、仿真、重定向和遥操作工具链，明显符合“灵巧手是核心贡献”的收录标准。其余看似相关的工作要么早于上次成功运行的时间戳，要么不够满足严格的新颖性条件，因此未纳入。
summary_en: This run found 1 genuinely new and sufficiently relevant item since the prior successful run: `MIDAS Hand`. It was first public on 2026-07-16 and presents a low-cost, open-source, human-scale dexterous hand with tactile sensing, plus a released stack for control, tactile APIs, simulation, retargeting, and teleoperation. Other candidate papers I checked were either earlier than the last successful run timestamp or did not meet the strict novelty bar, so they were excluded.

items.title: MIDAS Hand: Modular low-Impedance Directly-driven Anthropomorphic Sensing Hand
items.authors_or_org: Alvin Zhu, Mingzhang Zhu, Beom Jun Kim, Quanyou Wang, Jose Victor S. H. Ramos, Dennis Hong
items.relevance: 这是一个低成本、开源、带触觉感知的类人尺度灵巧手平台，并连同控制、触觉 API、仿真模型、重定向与遥操作工具链一起发布，直接把灵巧手硬件与可复现实验能力作为核心贡献。
items.relevance_en: This is a low-cost, open-source, tactile, human-scale dexterous hand platform, released together with control, tactile API, simulation, retargeting, and teleoperation tooling, making the hardware and reproducible experimentation the core contribution.
items.novelty_signal: 这是 2026-07-16 首次公开的新增硬件与软件全栈发布，同时给出了实机表征、触觉感知演示和完整项目页，属于很强的新颖信号。
items.novelty_signal_en: It was first made public on 2026-07-16 as a new hardware-plus-software stack, with real-system characterization, tactile sensing demos, and a full project page, which is a strong novelty signal.
items.analysis_zh: 这项工作的主要工作是发布 MIDAS Hand，一个低成本、开源、类人尺度的灵巧手平台，并配套公开控制、触觉接口、仿真、重定向和遥操作工具链。它解决的问题是灵巧手研究常受限于硬件昂贵、维护复杂、触觉难集成以及跨平台复用成本高。方法上，作者把 16 个自由度、13 个主动自由度、283 个三轴触觉单元、直接驱动和 3D 打印模块化结构整合到同一套可复现系统中。实验上，公开材料展示了工作空间与抓取类型分析、负载与可靠性测试、反驱动性测量，以及带触觉的遥操作演示。结果上，这个系统以约 700 g、材料成本低于 3000 美元的形式，提供了一个平衡的灵巧操作研究平台，并支持人到机器人数据采集。总结来看，它的贡献主要在于把灵巧手研究的门槛显著降低，并提升可复现性；限制是目前公开信息对更大规模任务基准、长期稳定性和跨任务泛化的说明仍不充分。
items.analysis_en: The main contribution of MIDAS Hand is an open, low-cost, human-scale dexterous hand platform with integrated tactile sensing, together with a released software stack for control, tactile APIs, simulation, retargeting, and teleoperation. It addresses the practical bottlenecks that often slow dexterous-hand research: expensive hardware, difficult maintenance, poor tactile integration, and high integration overhead across platforms. The method combines 16 total DoF, 13 active DoF, 283 three-axis tactile taxels, direct-drive actuation, and modular 3D-printed construction into one reproducible system. The public evaluation includes workspace and grasp-taxonomy analysis, payload and reliability tests, backdrivability measurements, and teleoperation demonstrations with tactile sensing. The reported result is a balanced research platform at roughly 700 g and under USD 3,000 that is positioned for tactile dexterous manipulation and human-to-robot data collection. In summary, this is a strong infrastructure contribution for the field because it lowers the barrier to experimentation and improves reproducibility; its limitation is that the public release still leaves some questions open about large-scale task benchmarking, long-term robustness, and transfer across tasks.

caveats: 本轮严格按“上次成功运行之后才算新增”的时序条件筛选，只有 MIDAS Hand 进入结果集。
其余候选工作虽然与灵巧手主题接近，但发布时间早于本次截点，或不满足灵巧手/灵巧操作必须是核心贡献的标准。
本次未对历史 seen-items 做不必要改写，只补充新增条目。
